name: Check of only spaces input in LYRASIS
fullName: Search libraries and books: Check of only spaces input in LYRASIS

steps.name: When  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
And  I input only spaces in search field
Then  There is no results on catalog books screen
